what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG filter/funnel icon using a single stroked path with no fill.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with explicit width and height of 24.
The icon inherits color through stroke="currentColor".
The drawing is a single path forming a funnel shape with a lower stem.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
The SVG contains no title, desc, role, or aria attributes.
standouts: Line styling is defined directly on the SVG element.
conventions: Uses common icon sizing of 24 by 24.
Uses an outline icon style with fill="none" and stroked geometry.
Uses rounded stroke endings and joins.
Keeps the asset self-contained with inline SVG attributes.
concerns: No embedded accessible name or decorative-use hint is present in the SVG itself.
notes: A compact reusable outline SVG for a filter control or filtering state.
questions: Should this SVG be treated as decorative or given an accessible label by its consumer?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a filter icon, and the SVG content draws a funnel/filter symbol.
intention_signals: It appears intended as a reusable UI icon that can adopt surrounding text or control color through currentColor.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable filter/funnel icon asset with fixed 24px geometry and outline stroke styling.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 outline SVG filter icon made from one currentColor stroked funnel-shaped path.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for providing a reusable filter icon asset for UI controls or states.
